event: View of a paper mill at Ornans
description: A rural landscape showing a wooden waterwheel and mill structure spanning a small stream. Wooden planks and beams form a bridge and sluice system. A small yellow stone building with a dark window stands at the upper right. Autumn foliage in red and green fills the middle ground. Green hillsides rise behind. The water reflects the surrounding structures. The palette is rich in earth tones, greens, and golden-brown hues.
